name: flow-03-event-registration-manager
description: T60 EventRegistrationManager — PROCESSING archetype. registerAtomically(): capacity check + write ONE atomic operation (never check-then-write).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: atomic-check-write, no check-then-write race condition
Retrieve PROCESSING arch pattern for T60: atomic capacity check + write, registration race prevention
Break T60 into: atomic capacity decrement + registration write → emit RegistrationConfirmed or CapacityExhausted
Generate event-registration-manager.service.ts — registerAtomically(): capacity check + write ONE atomic operation (never check-then-write).
Named check validation: atomic_check_write, no_toctou_race, capacity_decrement_in_transaction
Score generated code 0-100 against T60 iron rules: atomic check-write, race condition prevention
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=atomic-check-write, rejected=check-then-write race. curriculumTier=1.
